title: Run podman machine os apply displays the error: unsupported OS
body:
### Issue Description

Executing `podman machine os apply` on Windows to update Podman server-side version results in an error message: `Error: unsupported OS`.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Executing `podman machine os apply quay.io/podman/machine-os:5.4` on Windows
2. Waiting for a moment.
3. Failed with `Error: unsupported OS`.


### Describe the results you received

It only display below:

```
Error: unsupported OS
Error: Process exited with status 125
```

### Describe the results you expected

Podman server-side version can be properly updated using `podman machine os apply`.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

comments.body:
This is expected, the WSL image is a "normal" fedora image with dnf not an rpm-ostree image based on Fedora CoreOS. As such there is no way to update the image with WSL.

You could run `dnf up` inside the WSL image to update it just like regular Fedora.

I leave it up as the docs need to be updates that this is only supported with rpm-ostree.
